title: incorrect constant propogation
body:
Using Verilator 4.215 devel rev v4.214-9-g20e896ec. 

Verilog is 
```
wire  _T_742 = ~io_resps_sink_c_bits_source[7]; // @[Parameters.scala 54:32]
wire  _T_745 = io_resps_sink_c_bits_source[6:0] <= 7'h40; // @[Parameters.scala 57:20]
wire  probeack_bit = _T_742 & _T_745; // @[Parameters.scala 56:50]
```

The assignment in cpp looks like:
```
// verilator v4.215
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__c_mshr__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_0__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_1__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_2__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_3__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_12__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_13__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_14__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__abc_mshr_15__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__bc_mshr__DOT__probeack_bit = 0U;
```

However, in v4.204 it works.
```
// verilator v4.204
vlTOPp->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__l2cache__DOT__slices_0__DOT__bc_mshr__DOT__probeack_bit
        = ((~ ((IData)(vlTOPp->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb_io_mem_release_bits_source)
               >> 7U)) & (0x40U >= (IData)(vlTOPp->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb_io_mem_release_bits_source)));
```

I search the files produced by v4.215 for the `memBlock*wb*` signals and find that
```
    vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb_io_mem_release_bits_source
        = ((((((((((((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1842)
                     | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_21)
                         ? 0x35U : 0U)) | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_22)
                                            ? 0x36U
                                            : 0U))
                   | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_23)
                       ? 0x37U : 0U)) | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_24)
                                          ? 0x38U : 0U))
                 | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_25)
                     ? 0x39U : 0U)) | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_26)
                                        ? 0x3aU : 0U))
               | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_27)
                   ? 0x3bU : 0U)) | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_28)
                                      ? 0x3cU : 0U))
             | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_29)
                 ? 0x3dU : 0U)) | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_30)
                                    ? 0x3eU : 0U))
           | ((IData)(vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__memBlock__DOT__dcache__DOT__dcache__DOT__wb__DOT___T_1157_31)
               ? 0x3fU : 0U));
```
I presume the signal is always less than 0x40U. Thus, `io_resps_sink_c_bits_source[7]` is always false, which implies `_T_742` is always true, and ` _T_745` is always true as well. Therefore, `probeack_bit` should always be true.

I think it should be some incorrect constant propogation assignments.

The verilog is attached. `*.cpp` files are too many and I removed them.
```
export NOOP_HOME=/path/to/XiangShan
make -C difftest emu_mk
```
[XiangShan.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/7402411/XiangShan.tar.gz)
